query: WITH entities AS (SELECT public_id, id FROM core_customers WHERE COALESCE(kyc_verification = $1, $1 IS NULL) AND COALESCE(activity = $2, $2 IS NULL) AND COALESCE(customer_type = $3, $3 IS NULL) AND COALESCE(status = $4, $4 IS NULL) AND (COALESCE((public_id, id) > ($7, $6), $6 IS NULL)) ORDER BY public_id ASC, id ASC LIMIT $5) SELECT i.id AS "entity_id: Repo__Id", e.sequence, e.event, CASE WHEN $8 THEN e.context ELSE NULL::jsonb END as "context: es_entity::ContextData", e.recorded_at FROM entities i JOIN core_customer_events e ON i.id = e.id ORDER BY i.public_id asc, i.id asc, i.id, e.sequence
